SEARCH
Package ru.nsu.kiryushin.model

Class Game

java.lang.Object
ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.Game
public class Game extends Object
Core game model: holds the snake, food map, and win/lose logic.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final double
    CONST_SPEED
    Nanoseconds per tick at 1× speed; divide by the multiplier to get the actual interval.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Game(int columns, int rows, int winLength, int targetFoodCount)
    Creates a game with the given board dimensions and win condition.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    getColumns()
    Returns the board width in tiles.
    Map<Point,Food>
    getFoodsOnBoard()
    Returns a read-only view of the current food items on the board, keyed by position.
    int
    getRows()
    Returns the board height in tiles.
    Snake
    getSnake()
    Returns the snake.
    double
    getSpeed()
    Returns the timer interval in nanoseconds between game ticks.
    double
    getSpeedMultiplier()
    Returns the current speed multiplier (1.0 = normal, >1 = faster, <1 = slower).
    GameState
    getState()
    Returns the current game state.
    void
    queueDirection(Direction d)
    Queues a direction change.
    void
    setSpeed(double koef)
    Multiplies the current speed by the given coefficient, clamped to [0.5, 3.0].
    boolean
    update()
    Advances one game tick: moves the snake, checks collisions, and checks the win condition.

  • Field Details

    • CONST_SPEED

      public static final double CONST_SPEED
      Nanoseconds per tick at 1× speed; divide by the multiplier to get the actual interval.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Constructor Details

    • Game

      public Game(int columns, int rows, int winLength, int targetFoodCount)
      Creates a game with the given board dimensions and win condition.
      Parameters:
      columns - board width in tiles
      rows - board height in tiles
      winLength - snake length required to win
      targetFoodCount - number of food items kept on the board at all times

  • Method Details

    • setSpeed

      public void setSpeed(double koef)
      Multiplies the current speed by the given coefficient, clamped to [0.5, 3.0].
      Parameters:
      koef - speed multiplier

    • getSpeed

      public double getSpeed()
      Returns the timer interval in nanoseconds between game ticks.
      Returns:
      nanoseconds per tick

    • getSpeedMultiplier

      public double getSpeedMultiplier()
      Returns the current speed multiplier (1.0 = normal, >1 = faster, <1 = slower).
      Returns:
      speed multiplier

    • queueDirection

      public void queueDirection(Direction d)
      Queues a direction change. Validated against the last queued direction (or the current snake direction if the queue is empty) to prevent 180° turns. Excess inputs are dropped.
      Parameters:
      d - requested direction

    • update

      public boolean update()
      Advances one game tick: moves the snake, checks collisions, and checks the win condition.
      Returns:
      true if the game is still running, false if it has ended

    • getSnake

      public Snake getSnake()
      Returns the snake.
      Returns:
      snake instance

    • getFoodsOnBoard

      public Map<Point,Food> getFoodsOnBoard()
      Returns a read-only view of the current food items on the board, keyed by position.
      Returns:
      unmodifiable food map

    • getColumns

      public int getColumns()
      Returns the board width in tiles.
      Returns:
      column count

    • getRows

      public int getRows()
      Returns the board height in tiles.
      Returns:
      row count

    • getState

      public GameState getState()
      Returns the current game state.
      Returns:
      PLAYING, WON, or LOSE
